comment: Reference adapter for Claude Code on native Windows (requires Git for Windows, which supplies the bash that runs the .sh hooks/crons). Differs from claude-code.example.json in two places: scheduled-maint uses Windows Task Scheduler (setup/70-install-memory-schtasks.sh) instead of crontab, and the SessionStart/SessionEnd hook commands are wrapped through Git-bash by np-hook-lib.sh (NP_HOOK_WRAP) because Claude Code on Windows runs hook commands via PowerShell by default. The ~/.claude layout (skills/, settings.json) is the same as on Linux. Copy to ~/.config/nervepack/adapter.json (per-machine; not committed).
